metadata.title: AI Dance Generator Online | Upload One Image
metadata.description: Use Toolaze AI Dance Generator online to upload one image and create short dance videos, choreography concepts, promos, and social clips.

hero.desc: Upload one image, then describe the dance move, outfit, lighting, and stage mood to create a short AI dance video for promos, choreography concepts, and social posts.

intro.title: Create Dance Videos From One Uploaded Image

content.title: Turn one image into a dance video
content.text: Toolaze AI Dance Generator helps creators animate a single uploaded image into a short full-body performance video. Use it for dance promos, choreography mood boards, class announcements, and short-form social clips.

content.title: Guide motion, camera, and stage direction
content.text: Upload one clear image, then describe the dance genre, motion, wardrobe, lighting, camera angle, and background so the workflow stays focused on short dance clips.

content.title: Keep the source simple
content.text: Use one image with a visible subject, then refine the prompt with details like full-body framing, motion energy, spotlight, studio background, or camera movement.

promptExamples.title: Dance Prompt Ideas You Can Reuse
promptExamples.subtitle: Use a simple prompt after uploading one image, then generate a short dance video.

items.title: Hip-Hop Stage
items.prompt: Make the person in the image do a simple hip-hop dance.
items.note: Good for class promos, music clips, and urban performance concepts.

items.title: Ballet Motion
items.prompt: Make the person in the image do a graceful dance.
items.note: Use this when the video needs elegance, balance, and clear body lines.

items.title: K-Pop Performance
items.prompt: Make the person in the image do a K-pop dance.
items.note: Good for energetic fan edits, covers, and social campaign clips.

items.title: Latin Dance
items.prompt: Make the person in the image do a lively dance.
items.note: Use for salsa, bachata, ballroom, and stage showcase concepts.

items.title: Street Dance
items.prompt: Make the person in the image dance on a city street.
items.note: Good for dance crews, local events, and casual creator clips.

howToUse.title: How to Use the AI Dance Generator

steps.title: Upload one image
steps.desc: Start with a single clear portrait or full-body image where the subject is easy to recognize.

steps.title: Describe the dance transformation
steps.desc: Add the dance genre, motion, outfit, lighting, background, camera angle, and social video direction.

steps.title: Generate and refine
steps.desc: Create the video, then adjust the prompt if the motion needs clearer body lines, stronger movement, or a cleaner background.

scenesTitle: Where AI Dance Videos Work Best

scenes.title: Short-form social clips

scenes.title: Choreography mood boards

features.title: Key Features for Dance Video Creation

items.desc: Upload one source image and guide the dance motion, wardrobe, stage mood, and finished video framing with a prompt.

items.title: Prompt-led camera control

items.title: Movement-focused prompts
items.desc: Guide poses, body lines, energy, wardrobe movement, and stage mood for clearer dance clips.

faq.q: What is the AI Dance Generator?
faq.a: It is a Toolaze page for creating short dance-themed videos from one uploaded image plus a text prompt, including social clips, choreography concepts, stage promos, and creator posts.

faq.q: Does this page generate dance videos?
faq.a: Yes. The top tool uploads one image and creates a short dance video from your prompt.

faq.q: What should I include in a dance prompt?
faq.a: Include the dance genre, motion, outfit, performer framing, lighting, background, camera angle, and whether you want a vertical social clip or a wider stage shot. Start with one clear uploaded image.

faq.q: Can I use it for dance class marketing?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for drafting class promos, workshop clips, event teasers, social posts, and mood boards before you create final campaign assets.

faq.q: How do I get better full-body dance results?
faq.a: Upload a clear single image and ask for full-body framing, clear body lines, realistic anatomy, balanced motion, visible feet and hands, and a clean background. If the motion is too busy, simplify the move and regenerate.
